name: tasktick
title: TaskTick
description: Quick launcher for TaskTick scheduled tasks
author: lifedever

preferences.name: cliPath
preferences.title: CLI Path
preferences.description: Path to the tasktick CLI. Auto-detected if empty. For dev, point to /Applications/TaskTick Dev.app/Contents/MacOS/tasktick-dev.

preferences.name: showCompletionToast
preferences.title: Show in-Raycast Toast
preferences.description: Show an in-Raycast toast when you run, stop, or restart a task. Independent of TaskTick's system notifications.
preferences.label: Show feedback toast on Run/Stop/Restart

preferences.name: logsFormat
preferences.title: Logs Display
preferences.description: How the View Last Output detail renders logs.
